text: **Guy:** Hello, I'm {Guy Newsman|記者|/njuːzˈmæn/|Guy is a famous news reporter.} with News Channel XYZ.
**Guy:** I'm here in {Washington DC|首都|/ˈwɑːʃɪŋtən diˈsiː/|Washington DC is the capital of the USA.}
**Guy:** at the scene of a {crime|犯罪|/kraɪm/|A crime happened in the street.}
**Guy:** We are talking with this woman.
**Guy:** She saw the crime during her {lunch break|昼休み|/lʌntʃ breɪk/|Workers often eat lunch during break time.}
**Guy:** It looks like she {hurt|傷つけた|/hɜːrt/|He hurt his leg while playing soccer.} herself while she was trying to stop the crime.
**Guy:** Tell us your name
**Anna:** Hi Guy, I'm Anna.
**Guy:** Anna, what did you see and what happened to your {arm|腕|/ɑːrm/|My arm hurts after exercise.}?
**Anna:** Guy, I was {minding|気にしていた|/maɪnd/|She was minding her own business.} my own business.
**Anna:** See, I work over there.
**Anna:** I left work to get some {lunch|昼食|/lʌntʃ/|Let's have lunch together.}
**Anna:** Then suddenly I heard a woman {yelling|叫んでいる|/ˈjelɪŋ/|The child was yelling for help.}
**Anna:** She was yelling like this, help!
**Anna:** Help!
**Anna:** Two {robbers|強盗|/ˈrɑːbərz/|Robbers stole money from the bank.} were grabbing her bag.
**Anna:** She was hitting them with her {umbrella|傘|/ʌmˈbrelə/|She opened her umbrella in the rain.}
**Guy:** Is that when you hurt your arm?
**Anna:** No, at that time I was not fighting the robbers.
**Anna:** See, I was too far away and I didn't have my own umbrella
**Guy:** So what happened next?
**Anna:** They grabbed her bag and ran away.
**Anna:** So I grabbed her umbrella and ran after the robbers.
**Guy:** Then that is the time that you hurt your arm?
**Anna:** No
**Anna:** I was yelling, stop robbers, stop!
**Anna:** She was yelling, hey, come back with my umbrella.
**Guy:** What are you {afraid|恐れている|/əˈfreɪd/|Are you afraid of the dark?}?
**Anna:** I had no time to be afraid, guy.
**Anna:** Well, I had time while I was {resting|休んでいる|/ˈrestɪŋ/|He was resting after a long walk.} on a bench.
**Anna:** I had a lot of {time|時間/余裕}
**Guy:** Then what happened?
**Anna:** The {robbers|強盗} got on a bus.
**Anna:** So I {ran|走った/疾走した} after the {bus|バス/乗り物}
**Anna:** While I was {running|走っている}, I {tripped|つまずいた/転んだ} and fell.
**Guy:** And that is the time that you hurt your arm?
**Anna:** No.
**Anna:** While I was {lying|横たわっている/寝ている} on the ground, someone said
**Anna:** {Stepped|踏んだ/踏み付けた} on my arm.
**Guy:** Ouch, that's too bad.
**Anna:** Yeah.
**Anna:** And they didn't {apologize|謝罪する/詫びる}
**Anna:** Well, then the {robbers|強盗} got themselves {kicked|蹴られた} off the bus.
**Guy:** Why?
**Anna:** They didn't pay.
**Anna:** You've gotta pay when you get on a bus.
**Anna:** The {police|警察} came and took them away.
**Guy:** And that's when you hurt your arm?
**Anna:** No.
**Guy:** Then when did you hurt yourself?
**Anna:** Well, guy.
**Anna:** By this time, I was feeling very {hungry|空腹の/飢えた}.
**Anna:** So I went to my {office|事務所/職場} to get a {snack|軽食/おやつ}.
**Anna:** Anna, I'm calling for help right now.
**Guy:** Hello.
**Anna:** Yes, please come right away.
**Anna:** My {co-worker|同僚/同僚の人} is stuck in a {vending machine|自動販売機}.
**Guy:** You hurt your arm in a vending machine buying a bag of chips?
**Anna:** I was really hungry and the bag was stuck.
**Anna:** I had to
**Guy:** That's all from news channel {XYZ|ニュースチャンネル名}.
**Guy:** This is Guy Newsman saying {goodbye|さようなら}.
**Guy:** Okay, we have to {find|見つける/探す} ourselves another {story|ニュース/物語} {guys|仲間/みんな}.
**Anna:** Until next time.
**Anna:** Bye mom
